Statement: DEL-008-04 requires DEL-008-03 Construction Survey records including control point coordinates descriptions and datum reference as the basis for as-built survey control

EvidenceQuote: Construction is substantially or fully complete -- confirmed in writing by the project manager
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-1 in Procedure. Also in Specification REQ-008 and Datasheet Conditions. Gates all field work.

EvidenceQuote: IFC drawings for all project components are available to the Surveyor in a usable format for as-built comparison
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-8 in Procedure. Also required by Specification REQ-003. Source and custodian TBD (see GAP-008).

Statement: Construction as-built markups (contractor redlines) and construction records must be available for reference before field work
EvidenceQuote: Construction as-built markups (contractor redlines) and construction records are available for reference
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-4 in Procedure. Also in Datasheet Conditions. Required for underground infrastructure documentation.

Statement: Site access for the final survey must be arranged with the Owner / site operations before field work commences
EvidenceQuote: Site access for the final survey has been arranged with the Owner / site operations
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-2 in Procedure. Also in Datasheet Conditions. Active landfill site requires coordination.

TargetName: Owner Approval of Scope and Accuracy
Statement: Owner must confirm or accept by default the accuracy standard and deliverable format for the as-built survey before field work
EvidenceQuote: Owner has been consulted and has confirmed the accuracy standard and deliverable format
Notes: FACT. Explicit prerequisite P-5 in Procedure. Relates to GAP-001 and GAP-002. Resolution required before field deployment.

Statement: As-built survey provides objective evidence supporting the Owner issuance of the Construction Completion Certificate under RFP ss2.14

EvidenceQuote: as-built survey supports the Owner issuance of the Construction Completion Certificate (CCC) under RFP ss2.14
Notes: FACT. Guidance states as-built survey findings may affect CCC issuance. Downstream information flow to Owner closeout process.

Statement: Surveyor must hold Alberta Land Surveyor designation or have sub-contracted to ALS-designated professional -- verification required before field work commences
